calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-21-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Feb-25-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840

Vivian Leung Lerche, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff, American Express Centurian Bank,
Order Granting Waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Day, Scott AKA Scott M Day,
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:
Damages: $151,069.07
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0
Attorney's Fees: $0
Costs: $692.50
Total Judgment in the amount of $151,761.57

Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-11-2016 Continued To Apr-06-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
